question_intent: average number of pit stops for British drivers who finished in the top 10 in qualifying and raced at circuits in the United Kingdom

plan.question_intent: average number of pit stops for British drivers who finished in the top 10 in qualifying and raced at circuits in the United Kingdom
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.raceid, leaf_1.driverid, leaf_1.circuitid, leaf_1.num_pit_stops FROM (SELECT p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid, COUNT(p.stop) AS num_pit_stops FROM pitstops AS p JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid WHERE (c.country = 'United Kingdom') AND (d.nationality = 'British') AND (q.position <= 10) GROUP BY p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid, COUNT(p.stop) AS num_pit_stops

JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country = 'United Kingdom')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'Great Britain'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country = 'United Kingdom')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality = 'British')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'American', 'Canadian', 'French'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'American', 'Canadian', 'French'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French'))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French')) AND (q.position <= 10)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French')) AND (q.position <= 10 OR q.position IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid, COUNT(p.stop) AS num_pit_stops
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French')) AND (q.position <= 10 OR q.position IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid

build_logs.notes: calculates the average number of pit stops

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid, COUNT(p.stop) AS num_pit_stops
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French')) AND (q.position <= 10 OR q.position IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.num_pit_stops)
FROM (SELECT p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid, COUNT(p.stop) AS num_pit_stops
FROM pitstops AS p
JOIN races AS r ON p.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON p.raceid = q.raceid AND p.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN drivers AS d ON p.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE (c.country IN ('United Kingdom', 'United States', 'Canada', 'France')) AND (d.nationality IN ('British', 'German', 'Canadian', 'French')) AND (q.position <= 10 OR q.position IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.raceid, p.driverid, c.circuitid) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.pit_stops)
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, d.driverid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position IS NULL OR q.position <= 10)
GROUP BY r.raceid, d.driverid) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of pit stops per driver per race across all races held in the United Kingdom, United States, Canada, or France, where the driver is British, German, Canadian, or French and either qualified in the top 10 or did not qualify?
